h1_heading: Naturals Unisex Salon - JP Nagar 5th Phase
hero_tagline: Elevate Your Style in South Bangalore
about_store_text:
Welcome to Naturals Unisex Salon JP Nagar 5th Phase — south Bangalore's premium beauty destination on 100 Ft Ring Road. Nestled in the heart of JP Nagar's 5th Phase, our salon has been the go-to choice for residents of JP Nagar, Banashankari, Jayanagar and Uttarahalli for expert hair care, radiant skin treatments and flawless bridal packages.
 
 Our team of certified stylists specialises in precision haircuts, balayage and global colour, keratin smoothening, hair spa therapies, and a full range of facials tailored to Bangalore's climate and skin types. Whether you're preparing for a wedding, a corporate event, or simply your weekly self-care ritual, every visit at our JP Nagar salon is crafted around you.
 
 Part of India's most trusted salon network with over 25 years of expertise across 1,000+ outlets, Naturals brings national-standard beauty services to your neighbourhood — with transparent pricing, premium products, and no surprises. Book your appointment online or walk in at Anand Onyx, 1st Floor, 15th Cross, 100 Ft Ring Road.

Discover a sanctuary of beauty in South Bangalore. Our JP Nagar 5th Phase stylists specialize in global hair trends and rejuvenating skin therapies.

seo_title: Top Rated Salon in Elements Mall | Naturals Unisex Salon
meta_description: Premium hair coloring & spa services at Elements Mall. Visit North Bangalore's elite salon for a luxury transformation. Book now!
about_store_text:
Welcome to Naturals Unisex Salon at Elements Mall, Nagavara — north Bangalore's most convenient premium salon, located on the 3rd Floor of Elements Mall on Thanisandra Main Road, just minutes from Manyata Tech Park and Hebbal.
 
 Designed for the busy professional, our Elements Mall salon offers express and full-service beauty treatments that fit your schedule — from quick blowouts and express facials to full hair colour sessions and relaxing spa therapies. Whether you're a tech professional stepping away from the office, or a weekend shopper looking to unwind, our certified stylists deliver precision results with premium products every time.
 
 Our services include haircuts and styling for all hair types, global and fashion hair colour, keratin and smoothening treatments, deep conditioning hair spas, advanced facials, and de-tan and clean-up treatments perfect for Bangalore's sun and pollution. As part of India's most trusted salon network — with 25 years of expertise — Naturals brings world-class beauty services to your neighbourhood mall. Book online or visit us on the 3rd Floor at Elements Mall.

Located inside the premier Elements Mall, our salon offers high-end grooming and beauty solutions tailored for the sophisticated urban lifestyle.

hero_tagline: A New Era of Luxury in Devasandra
about_store_text:
Welcome to Naturals Unisex Salon Devasandra — east Bangalore's trusted beauty destination, conveniently located on Devasandra Main Road, KR Puram, opposite the landmark Lulu's Bakery in Basavanapura.
 
 Our Devasandra salon serves the rapidly growing communities of KR Puram, Mahadevapura, ITPL Road, Hoodi and Varthur with a full range of professional beauty services — from everyday haircuts and hair colour to bridal packages, deep conditioning treatments, skin care and body wellness therapies. Our team of experienced stylists knows that every client is unique, which is why each visit begins with a personalised consultation to understand your hair type, skin concerns and lifestyle.
 
 Families in KR Puram have trusted Naturals for premium-quality beauty services at honest, transparent prices. Whether you're looking for a weekend blow-dry, a pre-festival makeover, or a full bridal preparation, our Devasandra team is here to deliver results that last. Part of India's most respected salon network, Naturals brings 25 years of national expertise to your neighbourhood. Book your appointment online or walk in at Maruthi Tower, 1st Floor.

Welcome to our brand new, state-of-the-art luxury location in Devasandra. We bring international styling standards and elite skin care to the KR Puram community.

seo_title: Premium Salon in Frazer Town | Naturals Unisex Salon
meta_description: Professional hair styling & luxury beauty in Frazer Town. Expert services in a heritage neighborhood. Book your appointment today!
about_store_text:
Welcome to Naturals Unisex Salon Frazer Town — centrally located on Mosque Road, Pulikeshi Nagar, above Poorvika Mobile Store, in the heart of one of Bangalore's most vibrant and well-connected neighbourhoods.
 
 Our Frazer Town salon caters to Bangalore's most diverse clientele — from professionals working in the CBD and Shivajinagar, to residents of Frazer Town, Richards Town, Lingarajapuram and Ulsoor. We offer a comprehensive range of beauty services including precision haircuts, global and highlight hair colour, keratin and rebonding treatments, hair spa, advanced facials, bridal and party makeup, mehendi and full bridal packages for all communities.
 
 What sets our Frazer Town salon apart is our team's deep experience with diverse hair textures and skin tones — from fine straight hair to thick curly and wavy types, and from fair to deep skin tones. Every treatment is selected and adapted to give you the best possible result. Transparent pricing, premium products, and a warm, welcoming space — that's the Naturals promise. Visit us on Mosque Road or book your appointment online.

Nestled in the heart of heritage Bangalore, our Frazer Town salon combines classic elegance with modern hair and skin innovations for an elite experience.

seo_title: Best Beauty Salon in Hennur | Naturals Unisex Salon
meta_description: Expert hair styling & skin treatments in Hennur. Premium salon services for gated communities in North Bangalore. Book your visit!
hero_tagline: Your Neighborhood Destination for Elite Beauty
about_store_text:
Welcome to Naturals Unisex Salon Hennur — north Bangalore's trusted beauty salon, conveniently located above SBI Bank on Hennur Main Road at Hennur Cross, serving the fast-growing communities of Hennur, Kalyan Nagar, HBR Layout, Horamavu and Banaswadi.
 
 Hennur has transformed into one of Bangalore's most dynamic residential hubs, and our salon has grown with it — offering the neighbourhood access to premium salon services that were once only available in central Bangalore. From expert haircuts and the latest hair colour techniques, to relaxing hair spa therapies, brightening facials, de-tan treatments and full bridal packages, our certified team delivers outstanding results at honest, transparent prices.
 
 Our Hennur team is passionate about making every client feel pampered and confident — whether you're a working professional looking for a quick style refresh, a new bride preparing for your big day, or a family visiting together for the weekend. As part of India's most trusted salon chain with 25+ years of experience, Naturals brings the gold standard in beauty to your doorstep. Book online or walk in at Hennur Main Road.

Dedicated to excellence, our Hennur team provides personalized beauty consultations and advanced treatments designed for the modern resident of North Bangalore.
